title: Fenny's No Cooldown Indicator
description:
Removes The Attack Cooldown!
(Even Though You can just turn it off via Sodium.)
body:
A Texture Pack That Removes The "Cooldown" Indicator.

NOTE: THIS DOES NOT REMOVE NOR MODIFY THE GAME MECHANICS, IT'LL ONLY REMOVE THE COOLDOWN INDICATOR.

THIS HELPS OTHER PEOPLE IF THEY CANT FIND OR FIND A TEXTURE PACK WHICH DOES THIS, SO I DECIDED TO CREATE THIS!
